raw.subject: Your Fairfield page caught my eye
raw.body:
Hi,

Your photo of a happy pup with a fresh cut caught my attention. But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might make it harder for pet owners to find and book your services.

I sketched a page idea from your Facebook that could help showcase your grooming services, feature photos from your posts, and make it easy for customers to book a call.

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/all-about-the-dog-fairfield

Would you like to discuss how a simple online presence can help grow your business? For local businesses like yours, I offer a flat fee that's easy on the budget.
